buildCommand:
mkdir -p public && printf 'API

API only. See /health.

' > public/index.html && cd .. && bun --cwd server run db:generate && bun build server/src/index.ts --outfile server/dist/index.js --target node --format esm --external sharp --external '@prisma/client' --external '.prisma/client' --external '@aws-sdk/client-s3' --external '@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner' --external bcryptjs
